message:
feat(policy): add audited quarantine/kill-switch operations on PolicyEngine

Add convenience methods that wrap QuarantineRegistry operations and
simultaneously record to the tamper-evident audit chain, creating a
unified governance trail across quarantine, release, and kill-switch events.

- quarantine_component(): quarantine + audit chain record
- release_component(): release/probation + audit chain record
- trip_kill_switch(): kill switch + audit chain record
- 4 integration tests: quarantine, release, kill-switch, full lifecycle verify

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
